ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name (e.g., BOS, PHI, NYK) */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins for the team */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins for the team */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses for the team */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses for the team */,
  "home_win_percentage" REAL /* Home winning percentage of the team */,
  "away_win_percentage" REAL /* Away winning percentage of the team */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current win/loss streak of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., Atlantic Division, Central Division) */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the division belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference (e.g., Eastern Conference, Western Conference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 1990-91, 1991-92) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team in the season */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team in the season */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the division */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "points_scored" REAL /* Average points scored per game by the team in the season */,
  "points_allowed" REAL /* Average points allowed per game by the team in the season */,
  "point_difference" REAL /* Average point difference per game by the team in the season */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating of the team in the season */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating of the team in the season */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team manager, analyst) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game was played */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Arena where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "points_scored" REAL /* Average points scored per game by the player in the season */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Average rebounds per game by the player in the season */,
  "assists" REAL /* Average assists per game by the player in the season */,
  "steals" REAL /* Average steals per game by the player in the season */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Average blocks per game by the player in the season */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Average turnovers per game by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, shooting guard, small forward) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_salaries" (
  "player_salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player salary */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle, concussion) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year, Defensive Player of the Year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "draft_pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Pick number in the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
